top_signals.title: Brent Jumps 2% After US Strikes in Iran Rattle Oil Markets
top_signals.summary: Brent crude futures rose more than 2% on Tuesday after the U.S. military carried out strikes in Iran, keeping markets on edge as a deal to end the war and open up the Strait of Hormuz remained elusive.Brent futures LCOc1 were up $2.36, or 2.5%…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Decisions taken by the Governing Council of the ECB (in addition to decisions setting interest rates)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Hyperliquid rolls out validator-governed prediction markets for real-world events
top_signals.summary: The markets will be published through automated newsfeed software and governed by validators, the team said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin treasury firms add 603 BTC as Strategy pauses buying
top_signals.summary: Smaller Bitcoin treasury companies bought about $46 million worth of Bitcoin below $80,000 last week as the largest corporate holder paused its weekly buys.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: BHP blames tech limits for climate delays exposed in leaked documents
top_signals.summary: BHP says battery-electric haul trucks are not yet viable at scale as it defends postponing Pilbara decarbonization projects.
